reviewTexts:
Great vibe! Great service! Great food!
The Brussels sprout hash was amazing & unique. Would go back.

Usually, there's a wait list, since the food is so good. They do a good job of quickly and efficiently clearing tables to keep the wait as short as possible. The food is amazing, and the staff are super nice. It's no wonder this place gets slammed with customers. Weekdays, you might get right in, as we did most recently. Their menue accomodates our vegan friends, so we can all enjoy breakfast together.
Their vegan breakfast, especially the biscuit sandwhich is to die for 🤤

The food is excellent here. However the portion to price ratio is not the best. The "home fries" are not home fries, they are just small cubed fries. All in all it is a nice spot with quality tasting food, for a bit of a higher price.
The bathroom sink faucet in the mens room was broke, and it appeared that the light fixtures above the sink were missing as the exposed metal brackets just had a singular light bulb attached. The paper towel dispenser was empty with a few rolls of paper towels stacked on the sink.
Im sure these are things that will be fixed in the future.
Cute medium sized Cafe. Nice menu selection. Affordable. I enjoyed being there and stayed longer talking an drinking lattes. No pressure to eat up and go.
Great coffee, good food and excellent friendly customer service

unfair_advantage.label: social momentum
unfair_advantage.evidence: Social momentum is the standout here, awaiting Instagram data in the next scrape to show the exact margin.
